steps.title: Find the key contrast
steps.content: The passage states that the team's combined approach resulted in a "more comprehensive approach than independent efforts by experts in either discipline could have achieved." This direct contrast shows that bringing both disciplines together is beneficial.

steps.title: Match the collaborative relationship
steps.content:
The ______ of experts in these two disciplines produced a more comprehensive approach than either alone — the blank must name the working relationship between the engineers and entomologists. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — skepticism toward: doubt directed at the other discipline — this would undermine collaboration, contradicting the positive result. ✗
  • Choice B — exaggeration of: overstating — there's no mention of exaggerating anything. ✗
  • Choice C — distrust among: lack of trust between the two groups — again contradicts the successful joint approach. ✗
  • Choice D — collaboration between: working together across both disciplines — directly explains how combining engineers and entomologists yielded a more comprehensive outcome. ✓
D is correct.
